response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct vocal songs: '革命道中' and 'Catch the Moment'. 2. Scene 1 (00:00-02:13): '革命道中' performed by Tsunomaki Watame. Lyrics not found in search. 3. Scene 2 (02:13-02:22): Transition segment without vocal music. 4. Scene 3 (02:22-04:59): 'Catch the Moment' performed by Tsunomaki Watame, originally by LiSA. Full Japanese lyrics and English translation were found via search and formatted.
response.global_summary: A concert performance by VTuber Tsunomaki Watame featuring two vocal songs: 'Kakumei Dochu' and 'Catch the Moment'.

scenes.description: The video starts with Tsunomaki Watame performing 'Kakumei Dochu'. She is dancing on a stage with backup dancers.
A brief musical bridge with instrumental background music while the stage setup changes.
Tsunomaki Watame performs 'Catch the Moment', originally by LiSA. The stage lighting changes to blue, and she performs with animated background elements.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
そっと吐き出すため息を吸い込んだ
後悔は苦い味残して
いつもなんで？肝心なこと言えないまま
次の朝日が顔だしてる
嫌になった運命をナイフで切り刻んで
もう一度やり直したらキミに出会えないかも
僕の声が響いた瞬間に始まる命のリミット
心臓がカウントしてる
叶えても叶えても終わらない願い
汗をかいて走った世界の秒針はいつか止まった僕を置いていく
あと何回キミと笑えるの？
試してるんだ僕を catch the moment

一個幸せを数えるたびに変わっていく未来に怯えてしまうけど
愛情の種を大切に育てよう
分厚い雲もやがて突き破るかな
キミの声が響いた僕の全身を通って心臓のドアをノックしてる
「臆病」でも開けちゃうんだよ信じたいから
何にもないと思ったはずの足元にいつか深く確かな根を生やす
嵐の夜が来たとしても揺らいだりはしない
何回でも
追いついたり追い越したりキミがふいに分かんなくなって
息をしたタイミングが合うだけで嬉しくなったりして
集めた一秒を永遠にしていけるかな

僕の声が響いた瞬間に始まる命のリミット
心臓がカウントしてる
叶えても叶えても終わらない願い
汗をかいて走った世界の秒針がいつか止まった僕を置いていく
あと何回キミと笑えるの？
試してるんだ僕を catch the moment
逃がさないよ僕は
この瞬間を掴め catch the moment
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Taking a deep breath to quietly exhale, leaving a bitter taste of regret behind
Always wondering why? Unable to express my feelings, the next morning shows up
I got tired of fate, cutting it into pieces with a knife
If I start over, I might not meet you again
The limit of life begins when my voice echoes, my heart is counting
Wishes that never end even if they come true
The world's second hand, drawn with sweat, will eventually leave me behind
How many more times can I laugh with you?
I'm testing myself, catch the moment

Every time I count my happiness, I get scared of the changing future
Let's carefully nurture the seeds of love
Thick clouds will eventually break through, right?
Your voice echoes through my whole body, running to knock on the door of my heart
Even if I'm timid, I'll open up because I want to believe
Someday, deep and firm roots will grow beneath where I thought there was nothing
Even if a stormy night comes, I won't waver
No matter how many times
I catch up, overtake, or suddenly lose sight of you
Just the timing of our breaths matching makes me happy
Can we make each collected second last forever?

The limit of life begins when my voice echoes, my heart is counting
Wishes that never end even if they come true
The world's second hand, drawn with sweat, will eventually leave me behind
How many more times can I laugh with you?
I'm testing myself, catch the moment
I won't let it slip away
I'll seize this moment, catch the moment
